formulas.latex: r_{i}^{\left(b\right)} \left(\tau\right) = \left\{\right. \begin{matrix}\eta_{2} \cdot \underset{l \in \mathcal{L}_{i}}{\sum} \underset{k \in \left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\mathbb{N}}\right)_{i , l} \left(\tau\right)}{\sum} x_{i , l} \cdot f_{k , i , l}^{\left(b\right)} \left(\tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma}\right) \cdot V_{i , l} \left(\tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma}\right) , \\ \text{if} i \in \overset{\rightarrow}{\mathcal{S}} \backslash \left\{S\right\} , \left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\mathbb{N}}\right)_{i , l} \left(\tau\right) = \left\{k \in \overset{\rightarrow}{\mathcal{N}} : \tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma} \in \mathbb{T}_{i , l}\right\} \\ \eta_{2} \cdot \underset{l \in \mathcal{L}_{i}}{\sum} \underset{k \in \left(\overset{\leftarrow}{\mathbb{N}}\right)_{i , l} \left(\tau\right)}{\sum} x_{i , l} \cdot f_{k , i , l}^{\left(b\right)} \left(\tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma}\right) \cdot V_{i , l} \left(\tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma}\right) , \\ \text{if} i \in \overset{\leftarrow}{\mathcal{S}} \backslash \left\{2 S\right\} , \left(\overset{\leftarrow}{\mathbb{N}}\right)_{i , l} \left(\tau\right) = \left\{k \in \overset{\leftarrow}{\mathcal{N}} : \tau - \frac{d_{k , i} \cdot \delta}{\sigma} \in \mathbb{T}_{i , l}\right\} \\ 0 , \text{otherwise}\end{matrix}
